title: ranunculus cymbalaria f. exilis
intro: Ranunculus cymbalaria f. exilis is a lesser-known species of plant within the ranunculus genus, often referred to as the small-flowered buttercup. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ranunculus cymbalaria f. exilis include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. It can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
